creator: hasanalpinan@gmail.com
text:
I refresh ports.

# portsnap fetch update

then i want to install www/opera but i get this error output.

hasan# make install clean
===>  Installing for opera-10.61.6430
===>   opera-10.61.6430 depends on file: /usr/local/libdata/pkgconfig/x11.pc - found
===>   opera-10.61.6430 depends on file: /usr/local/libdata/pkgconfig/xext.pc - found
===>   opera-10.61.6430 depends on file: /usr/local/libdata/pkgconfig/sm.pc - found
===>   opera-10.61.6430 depends on file: /usr/local/libdata/pkgconfig/ice.pc - found
===>   opera-10.61.6430 depends on file: /usr/local/libdata/pkgconfig/xft.pc - found
===>   opera-10.61.6430 depends on file: /usr/local/libdata/pkgconfig/xrender.pc - found
===>   opera-10.61.6430 depends on package: gstreamer-plugins-vorbis>=0.10.0 - found
===>   opera-10.61.6430 depends on package: gstreamer-plugins-ogg>=0.10.0 - found
===>   opera-10.61.6430 depends on package: gstreamer-plugins-theora>=0.10.0 - found
===>   opera-10.61.6430 depends on shared library: freetype.9 - found
===>   opera-10.61.6430 depends on shared library: fontconfig.1 - found
===>   opera-10.61.6430 depends on shared library: cups.2 - found
===>   Generating temporary packing list
===>  Checking if www/opera already installed
mv: /usr/ports/www/opera/work/opera-10.61-6430.amd64.freebsd/share/man: No such file or directory
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/www/opera.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/www/opera.

Sorry about my English. Thanks for your support.

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/www/opera && make install clean
